Author:     Ronald Klop <ronald@FreeBSD.org>

    databases/mongodb60: enable non-AVX CPUs by default

    Similar to the change in mongodb50.
    Preparation so this can become the default mongodb port for net-mgmt/unifi8.

    PR:     277990
